channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: La mitad de los líderes de la alta dirección abandonarán sus empresas en dos años
item.description: Una nueva encuesta de Gartner realizada a más de 200 directivos revela que el 56% de estos ve “extremadamente probable” renunciar a su trabajo actual en los próximos dos años, y el 27% planea hacerlo en los próximos seis meses.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: I hate today's Wordle so much it might be my least favorite ever. And I bet you hate it too
item.description: Is it possible to have a phobia of a certain type of Wordle? If it is, I have it. Here's why I hate today's game so much.
item.dc:creator: marc.mclaren@futurenet.com (Marc McLaren), TechRadar

item.title: Trump's AI ambition and China's DeepSeek overshadow an AI summit in Paris
item.description: PARIS (AP) — The geopolitics of artificial intelligence will be in focus at a major summit in France where world leaders, executives and experts will hammer out pledges on guiding the development of the rapidly advancing technology.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIE CORBET and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Future of Connectivity: AST SpaceMobile's Ambitious Plan for Global Cell Service
item.description: AST SpaceMobile is working to achieve global cellular broadband network that can connect directly to your everyday smartphone, no special equipment required.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hawaii is the rainbow capital of the world. Here's what that means
item.description: Hawaii’s sunshine, short rain showers and clean air together create some of the planet's best conditions for viewing rainbows.
item.dc:creator: Audrey Mcavoy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Latino workers working to overcome a technological divide brought on by automation, AI
item.description: As jobs become more reliant on technology some Latino workers can be left behind due to a lack of digital skills exacerbated by a lack of accessibility.
item.dc:creator: Fernanda Figueroa, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: PlayStation Network outage live updates – PSN is back and compensation announced
item.description: PSN is finally back around 24 hours after it first went down. Here's what happened, and any further updates as we get them.
item.dc:creator: marc.mclaren@futurenet.com (Marc McLaren), TechRadar

item.title: Sony PlayStation Network outage enrages gamers around the world
item.description: Sony’s PlayStation Network (PSN) is experiencing a major outage across the world, leaving tens of thousands of gamers unable to access online services, stores and multimedia apps.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: OnePlus Open 2 could make the Galaxy Fold 6 look old with invisible crease, according to new teaser
item.description: Another official picture of the Oppo Find N5 – also known as the OnePlus Open 2 – has appeared online.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Visual Studio Code unveils Copilot code editing suggestions
item.description: A just-released update of Visual Studio Code, version 1.97, introduces a preview of Copilot Next Edit Suggestions, an AI-powered feature that predicts the next edit the user wants to make.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How the slash-and-burn tactics Musk brought to Washington backfired at Twitter
item.description: When Elon Musk bought Twitter in 2022, he laid off thousands of employees, stopped paying rent and auctioned off coffee makers and office chairs in hopes of a big turnaround.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Google scraps its diversity hiring goals as it complies with Trump's new government contractor rules
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google is scrapping some of its diversity hiring targets, joining a lengthening list of U.S. companies that have abandoned or scaled back their diversity, equity and inclusion programs.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Apple lashes out at iPhone porn app maker and the EU rules allowing its download
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple has chided a newly introduced pornography app available in the European Union, warning that the bloc’s digital rules opening the way for third-party app store downloads undermines consumer confidence in the tech giant.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Judge says Elon Musk's claims of harm from OpenAI are a 'stretch' but welcomes possible trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Elon Musk's lawyers faced off with OpenAI in court Tuesday as a federal judge weighed the billionaire's request for a court order that would block the ChatGPT maker from converting itself to a for-profit company. U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Google's rising holiday's season ad sales aren't enough to ease worries about AI letdown
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google's digital ad sales continued to grow at a healthy clip during the holiday season, but that wasn't enough to offset investors' worries about whether its big bet on artificial intelligence will be lucrative as once envisioned.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: A look inside the Trump administration approach to artificial intelligence
item.description: "I think we think of AI as primarily a bunch of the software geeks who are out there coding somewhere, but there's real hardware involved," said Neil Chilson. The post A look inside the Trump administration approach to artificial intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Cisco: Latest news and insights
item.description: Cisco is the dominant vendor in enterprise networking, and under CEO Chuck Robbins, it continues to shake things up. Its most recent mega-acquisition is its $28 billion purchase of Splunk, a bold move that adds revenue opportunities in observability, data analytics, AIOps, and genAI.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to easily transfer files and photos off a computer to your hard drive
item.description: It's not just about freeing up space on your computer, Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says. It's about protecting your digital memories and important documents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google makes its appeal to overturn jury verdict branding the Play Store as illegal monopoly
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google went to appeals court Monday in an attempt to convince a three-judge panel to overturn a jury's verdict declaring its app store for Android smartphones as an illegal monopoly and block the penalties imposed by a federal judge to stop the misbehavior.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Trump signs order to create US sovereign wealth fund, eyeing TikTok purchase
item.description: President Trump on Monday directed secretaries to begin a process to create an American sovereign wealth fund, suggesting it could partially own the popular app TikTok.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates explores the making of his internal operating system in new memoir
item.description: As he prepares to turn 70 later this year, Microsoft founder Bill Gates' new memoir explores how his childhood quirks, upbringing, friendships and experiences coalesced into shaping his internal operating system.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bill Gates shares his thoughts on vaccine backlash, Intel's woes and Google's antitrust battle
item.description: Although Microsoft founder Bill Gates sat down for an interview with The Associated Press to discuss his new memoir, “Source Code: My Beginnings,” he also shared his views on a variety of other topics, including vaccine conspiracy views about him, his thoughts on the struggles of longtime computer c
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
